action.reasoning: Observation: iteration 2 train.py failed with grid_sample shape error due to double unsqueeze. Analysis: grid_sample expects 4D grid (B, H_out, W_out, 2), but code produced 5D. Also coordinate normalization must match feature map size. Decision: fix model.py to use unsqueeze(2) for (B, N, 1, 2) grid; rewrite utils.py to compute correct normalized coordinates for local window and feature map; adjust train.py accordingly. Then run a quick training test (few episodes) to verify pipeline, save checkpoint, and submit eval to measure iteration time and learning signal.
